text: Standing in the luminous hallway and gazing into the installation room, I am enveloped by an atmosphere of quiet curiosity. The glass and light create both a barrier and an invitation—a threshold between the mundane world and a space of exploration. The inside, with its glowing wall, promises thought and innovation. I feel anticipation and openness, aware of mechanisms of safety and technology (the fire hose, the screens), and inclined to reflect on the nature of places built for learning and discovery.
